source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for editorial product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for headings, body, labels, and numerals.
layout: Tide-line dividers, stratified rock card edges, 8px radius controls, story-forward dashboards, and dense coastal archive surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent sea stack motif source
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a sea stack rock motif for a Morphous design system named "Morphous Sea Stack". The motif is a rugged grey coastal sea stack rock rising from sea blue water with foam white surf, storm-coast weathering, basalt ledges, wet stone highlights, and a compact storytelling-system silhouette. No text.
Subject: A single isolated sea stack rock with layered grey rock faces, tide-cut base, small sea-blue wave shapes and foam-white spray accents hugging the base. Opaque solid subject suitable for clean background removal.
Composition/framing: centered complete motif with generous padding; do not crop the rock, base waves, or foam. Keep a clear readable silhouette for catalog preview.
Lighting/mood: dramatic overcast storm-coast light, natural grey rock, sea blue, foam white; premium coastal storytelling system mood.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no people, no birds, no boats, no lighthouse, no plants, no typography, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Sea Stack" derived from the visible transparent sea stack rock motif.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, icon language, and interaction language from the visible sea stack motif: weathered grey rock strata, deep sea blue, foam white surf, storm-coast mist, and tide-carved ledges. This light board is the primary reference for coding a coastal storytelling system.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable labels and UI samples.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Stack, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples with Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance. Keep all labels large and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, coastal map/story cards.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, quiet editorial product UI, foam-white surfaces, rock-grey borders, sea-blue primary actions, tide-line dividers, layered stratified texture, coastal storytelling dashboard.
Palette direction: Background foam white, foreground storm ink, primary sea blue, secondary basalt grey, accent mist blue, muted drift grey, surface cloud white, chart tones from rock shadow, wave teal, foam, and storm slate.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no tiny unreadable token tables, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Stack".

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Sea Stack design-system board. It must feel like the same coastal storytelling system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sea stack motif and the light-mode board language as references. Preserve the sea blue primary actions, basalt grey structure, foam white highlights, storm-coast storytelling mood, tide-line dividers, stratified rock texture, Japanese typography guidance, and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution, crisp readable labels and UI samples.
Required visible sections: Morphous Sea Stack, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: storm-ink background, basalt card surfaces, foam-white text, sea-blue primary accents, mist-blue focus states, drift-grey borders, restrained coastal contrast, layered rock shadows, clean product UI, 8px card radius.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command, sidebar navigation, metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, coastal story cards.
Palette direction: Background storm ink, foreground foam white, primary sea blue, secondary basalt grey, accent mist blue, muted drift grey, charts from wave teal, rock grey, foam, and tide blue.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no tiny unreadable token tables, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Sea Stack".
